site.title: IMGMOLD.COM - Premium Local Photo Compressor & Preset Resizer
site.description: Compress and resize passport photos, signatures, and document photos for UPSC, SSC, and official government exam forms locally in your browser. 100% secure, zero data transfer.
hero.title: Precision Photo & Document Resizer
hero.subtitle: Instantly resize and compress any photo, signature, or document entirely in your browser. Perfect for everyday use, professional attachments, and strict government exam forms.
features.fileSize.title: Strict File Size Targets
features.fileSize.description: Our proprietary binary search loop algorithm modulates canvas quality recursively to generate output files as close to your SIZE BUDGET LIMIT (KB) as mathematically possible without ever going over it.
features.signature.title: Signature Enhancer
features.signature.description: Turn YELLOW SHADOW-FILLED camera snapshots of signatures into pure black-and-white flatbed-scanned document quality using client-side pixel manipulation algorithms.
features.privacy.title: EXIF Privacy Shield
features.privacy.description: Exif, camera make, lens metadata, and GPS location coords are automatically stripped from your photos before download, ensuring MAXIMUM PRIVACY and preventing form upload validation issues.
video.title: See It In Action
video.subtitle: Watch our quick 60-second guide to resizing your documents perfectly.
comments.title: Community Comments
comments.subtitle: Join thousands of students, professionals, and travelers who trust ImgMold.
comments.form.title: Leave a Review
comments.form.name: Your Name
comments.form.submitted: Your review has been submitted for approval.
footer.localProcessing: Our tool operates completely locally. Your photos and signature files are processed inside your browser cache and never hit our servers.
workspace.dropTitle: Drag and drop your photos or signatures
workspace.dropDesc: Works for JPG, PNG, and WebP. Select one or multiple images to batch process them directly in your browser. No data leaves your device.
workspace.sigFilterDesc: Strips yellow shadows and soft gray backdrops, producing professional flatbed contrast (Pure White & Black).
workspace.burnBannerDesc: Overlay a compliant white banner at the bottom containing names, dates, or other mandatory labels.
workspace.sizeBudget: File Size is below budget limit
workspace.autoConfig: Auto-configured with metadata stripped for your security and privacy.
